deals.title: Gratis Corona Bier zu jedem Hauptgericht (während Live-Spielen)
deals.description: Carlos - Mexican Cuisine & Bar auf Instagram: "Vienna, are you ready for the FIFA World Cup? ⚽🔥 Carlos Mexican Restaurant & Bar is ready! Watch the live matches on big screens and enjoy the full football fiesta with Mexican food, cold drinks, and amazing vibes. 🌮 World Cup Deal 🍺 FREE Corona with every main meal 📺 Only during live matches 📍 LugnerCity, Quelle: Instagram/Public Search.
